summary: Frontend-only regression after Lenis smooth scroll + Reveal (framer-motion) wrap. All 6 routes load cleanly (/, /radio, /artists, /schedule, /about, /contact). 0 pageerrors, 0 React/JS errors across pages (only 1 benign WebGL perf warning). Lenis is initialized (document.documentElement.classList contains 'lenis'); scroll dispatches no errors. Reveal animations correctly trigger on scroll-into-view: all 12 song cards, glossary cards, 12 artist cards, 7 schedule rows, and 3 about pillars become visible after the relevant scroll. Queue↔Player sync now works: clicking queue-item-2 on /radio updates player-song-title (initial 'Avatar' -> 'NOT ANYMORE'), next->'switch it up', prev returns to 'NOT ANYMORE'. refinery-play-btn toggles, schedule-remind-0 click works, contact form submission shows 'Transmitted ✓'. Volume slider accepts new value (set to 42).
spec_vs_implementation_notes: Spec asked for 'song-card-0..11' (index-based). Actual implementation uses song.id (1..12) via SongCard.jsx line 7 (data-testid=`song-card-${song.id}`). All 12 cards render and are visible after scroll — functional pass, just a 0- vs 1-indexed convention mismatch. If strict index naming is desired, change SongCard to accept and use the index prop already passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Reveal wrapper uses initial opacity:0 + filter:blur(10px). With margin '-10% 0px -10% 0px' for useInView and 'once: true', content correctly stays animated-in after first reveal — no risk of permanently invisible sections (verified by scrolling through all pages).
SmoothScroll mounts Lenis with rAF loop and cleans up cancelAnimationFrame + lenis.destroy() on unmount — no leak. smoothTouch:false is fine for desktop testing.
SongCard testid is keyed by song.id; either align to index for spec compliance, or keep id-based (more stable to data reordering) and update spec.

frontend.out.log historically showed a stale ArtistsPage.jsx parsing error from a prior edit; current source is well-formed and webpack now reports only the unrelated mediapipe sourcemap warning. No action needed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 10 spec checks pass; song-card-0 absent is a naming convention only — all 12 song cards render)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lenis + Reveal integration is regression-clean. PlayerContext refactor verified working (queue clicks update bottom player title). Only nuance: SongCard testid is 1-indexed by song.id, not 0-indexed by array index. Verified: 12 song-cards (ids 1–12), 12 artist-cards (0–11), 7 schedule rows (0–6), 3 about-pillars (0–2), all glossary cards, all reveal-driven sections become visible after appropriate scroll. Bottom RadioPlayer play/next/prev/volume all functional. Contact form submit -> 'Transmitted ✓'. No further retest required unless new features are added.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no functional issue found. The only spec deviation is the 0/1-indexing of song-card testids.
